workingTreeChange: apps/api/test/community-plan.spec.ts (added privacy-safe log-field assertion test, uncommitted at validation time)
acceptanceCriteriaMet: All providers (mock, cloudbase live, deploy-fallback) call shared generateCommunityPlan(createCompetitionDemoEngineInput(input)); no model/LLM service in apps/api/src
Guest judge-only generation; non-guest identities receive 403 FORBIDDEN
Guest mutations except generation and public reads rejected with 403 FORBIDDEN
Spoof-resistant 10/60s limiter with 120s bucket expiry, 10000 bucket cap, API_TRUSTED_PROXY_IPS-aware XFF; 11th request returns 429 RATE_LIMITED
Strict Zod input (.strict()); legacy arrays, unknown keys, PII, community_id rejected with 400 VALIDATION_ERROR
Unified success/error envelope validated by ApiFailureResultSchema

Generation log emits exactly {requestId, actor_kind, community_id, scenario_key, catalog_version, duration_ms, timestamp}; excludes preferences, accessibility_need, explanation copy, entity details, request body (now asserted by test)
CORS only adds necessary x-guest-mode allow-header; CloudBase-managed CORS path unaffected
576 provider profiles generate 576 plans with 576 unique scenario_key values
Missing curated place/event fails explicitly; matcher does not invent a route (shared engine tests)
gapClosed: Privacy-safe log-field assertion gap (run-0012 worker bundle claimed coverage but no test existed). Added 'emits a privacy-safe generation log with only allowed fields' test in apps/api/test/community-plan.spec.ts.
boundary: Validates R13 only. Does not provide GUI acceptance, R12, R15, R17 consolidated, R18 deployment, or TRAE Session UI evidence.
